items.claim: BSD possesses elite cardio and relentless forward pressure.
items.quote: BSD elite cardio relentless forward pressure

items.claim: BSD has strong wrestling and heavy ground and pound.
items.quote: strong wrestling takedowns and of course good heavy ground and pound pressure.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has an excellent submission game and is a black belt in jiu-jitsu.
items.quote: excellent submission game you know he's a black belt jujitsu.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett has high fight IQ in grappling exchanges.
items.quote: high fight IQ when it comes to grappling exchanges.

items.claim: BSD's takedown attempts will put him in a dangerous position against Paddy Pimblett's submission game.
items.quote: when you do that you're in Paddy's world now.

items.claim: BSD is a more technical striker than Paddy Pimblett.
items.quote: BSD I think is probably the more technical striker compared to, um, Paddy.

items.claim: Paddy Pimblett's chin holds up better than BSD's.
items.quote: I do think his chin holds up better than BSD.

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a five-year layoff.
Max Holloway has fought eight times since Conor McGregor's last fight.
items.quote: Max has fought eight times since then.

items.claim: Max Holloway has been touching the canvas in multiple recent fights.
items.quote: we have uh noticed Max Holloway has been touching the canvas uh in multiple fights recently.
